decisions.what: Created Footer.tsx with four link columns, social icon row, copyright and disclaimer rows
decisions.why: Specification required organized link columns (Product/Resources/Community/Legal), social icons (Twitter, MessageCircle, Send, Github from lucide-react) with min 44x44 touch targets via p-2, and bottom copyright/disclaimer block matching the described class structure.

decisions.what: Imported Footer in App.tsx and rendered <Footer /> after </main> within the outer wrapper div
decisions.why: Specification required Footer to be the last element completing the landing page structure inside the outer min-h-screen wrapper.

decisions.what: Added aria-label to each social anchor and aria-hidden to the icon
decisions.why: Icons-only links need accessible names; matches the accessibility patterns already used in Header.tsx.
